CustomField.description: Unique grouping key for this trip. Encodes the departure location code, direction, and date in the format LOCATION_DIRECTION_YYYY-MM-DD. Used to group related line items into the same trip.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Unique trip identifier in format LOCATION_DIRECTION_YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., NANT_DEL_2025-03-15). Automatically generated by the system.
CustomField.label: Trip Key
